final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn sketch aesthetic — exact illustration execution is yours
Composition: must show concept relationships clearly, with visual connections between nodes
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and their interconnections:
  - AI (人工智能)
  - MCP (Model Context Protocol)
  - AI Agent (AI智能体)
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill (AI技能)
  - 蒸馏 (Distillation)
  - CLI (Command Line Interface)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, beginner-friendly atmosphere — exact warmth level is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs hand-drawn paper texture — exact grain and line weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all concept names: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve hierarchical or relational structure showing how concepts connect, must be visually intuitive for beginners
Avoid: must avoid overly technical jargon without explanation, must avoid cluttered layouts
